programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: The Moms are all invited to LA for a photo shoot, but a misunderstanding leads to a fight that pits Kayla and Rachel against each other. Kayla gets upsetting news about her son Izaiah. Kiaya shares concerns about X'Zayveon being released from prison.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna worries that Braeson may need some additional help with his missing limb. After Christian misses Camille's 2nd birthday. Rachel trys to plan a family vacation to Florida and X'Zayveon comes home from prison and sees Amour for the very first time.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna takes Braeson to his first occupational therapy appointment. Madisen decides to stay in Arkansas. Rachel breaks up with Noah. Kiaya and Teazha open their home to X'Zayveon, and Kayla and Luke's relationship finally comes to an end.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: Maci and Chey organize a "Family Reunion" with the cast of Teen Mom OG and Teen Mom 2. When a surprise guest is revealed, drama surfaces between the castmates. Will the women be able to work through their issues, or will the drama tear them apart?

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The group sets out for their first activity together, where some unexpected bonds form. Later, the moms have their first session with life coach, Cheyenne Bryant, who encourages them to realize they're more alike than they think.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The entire cast begins to let loose and form new friendships, while a new dad joins the group. Leah decides to invite someone special to the reunion while Amber opens up about her strained relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: A challenging obstacle course lands a cast member in the hospital, while Coach Bryant forces the OGs to revisit their tumultuous past. As the group enjoys a backyard BBQ, a controversial cast member arrives, leaving everyone at a loss for words.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The cast deals with the aftershock of seeing Farrah again, as she threatens to derail the entire reunion. The boys head out on a boat for some dad time leaving the girls to spend time with Coach Bryant. Later, Maci and Farrah sit down face-to-face.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: What mom doesn't need a break? That's why cast members from across the Teen Mom franchise are coming together for a tropical vacation. But it's not all rest and relaxation, as the moms dive deep into relationship, friendship and parenting issues.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En medio del funeral, Benito arma un escándalo, le reclama a Ruth por dejar sola a Raquel y le dice que ella no tiene derecho a disponer de la fortuna. Ruth presenta a su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dan lectura al testamento de Raquel, la sorpresa es general cuando nombran heredera universal a Eva. Don Martín tiene planes de escapar del hospital psiquiátrico, busca ayuda para salir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora siente que el tiempo se le agota, piensa en matar a Gabriela si no firma los poderes. Una enfermera ficticia toma la silla de ruedas de Martín y lo ayuda a fugarse del psiquiátrico.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Aunque Soledad es víctima de agresiones en el pueblo por la noticia publicada sobre la enfermedad de la niña, ella no se detiene y está dispuesta a comprobar la verdad sobre la muerte de Hugo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: El plan de Hugo se complica, mientras a Soledad la consume la angustia por la enfermedad de su hija. Beatriz juega a confundir la fantasía y la realidad, con el verdadero Alcides.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: La llegada de una terrible enfermedad enciende las alarmas en el pueblo, pero lleva a Soledad a ver a Alcides de otra manera. Se descubre un secreto que guarda Esther desde hace muchos años.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad está a punto de faltar a la memoria de Hugo, cuando siente celos de Eloísa y Alcides. La venganza de Beatriz está en riesgo cuando alguien entra a la cabaña y descubre a su rehén.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza se reencuentra con su hijo cuando él va a visitar a Verónica. Antonia acepta la sociedad con Verónica. Aníbal enfrenta a su hijo, sabe que le ha declarado la guerra. El juez Villegas se molesta cuando Patricia le presenta a una sexóloga.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gertrudis negocia con Verónica. Patricia le confiesa a Ricardo que él es hermano de Alejandro. Irene se queda boquiabierta con la revelación. Aníbal teme que puedan acabar con su hijo. Julio busca el apoyo de los Lobos para eliminar al Lagarto.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy helps a local musician get back to reality after success goes to his head.

programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee find that a good father-son relationship is more important to Opie than keeping him away from the sheriff's office.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack as he heads to Florida's gulf coast! He and wife Sue learn the truth behind the legends of manatees and mermaids. Then, they get a once-in-a-lifetime experience swimming with manatees in Crystal River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he honors the hard-working moms of all species, like Brown Bears, Chimpanzees, Elephants, Nyala Antelope, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on Land & Sea
programme.desc: Today, species that split their time between dry land and water. From alligators in the Florida Everglades, to elephants in a river in Borneo, and a surprising species that makes its home on a waterfall!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Florida to meet some unexpected residents in the small town of Wauchula. Nestled among the orange groves, the Center for Great Apes is providing a loving home to dozens of orangutans and chimpanzees in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the Wild West to meet up with some of America's most iconic species! Bears, Wolves, Bison, Big Horn Sheep and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to Australia's Gold Coast. Meet a rare blue-eyed koala, feed a Tasmanian devil and watch a tiger jump over Jack! Things get messy when Jack meets up with some boys from the outback and tries his hand at an Aussie tradition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue travel Down Under to visit one of the newest and greenest animal sanctuaries in Australia. They meet up with an inspiring young couple that is running a totally sustainable B&B while caring for orphaned and injured wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hair Raising Adventures
programme.desc: Today, Jack is counting down six nerve-wracking adventures that are NOT for the faint of heart. Diving deep underwater in a submarine, trekking into Mandrill country, coming face-to-face with a mountain lion and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack travels to the Katmai region of Alaska to experience the annual arrival of throngs of brown bears feeding on Sockeye salmon in the Kulik River. Jack encounters bears everywhere, even on a makeshift tundra golf course.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stuck on You
programme.desc: Today, Jack is counting down animals that count on each other! Birds that groom buffalo, lions that feed jackals, and catfish fed by bats are just some of the amazing symbiotic relationships on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he discovers what it’s like to work in the wild thanks to six of the wildest guides ever. African Elephants, Hippos, Guanacos, Gorillas, Wildebeest, Zebra, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle for six daring adventures with the King of Beasts! From Lion Cubs in Kenya and rare White Lions in South Africa to a once-in-a-lifetime walk with lions in Zambia, come along for six daring adventures with the ultimate big cats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack encounters reptiles including an Eye Lash Viper, a huge Python, and the deadly Bushmaster at the World of Snakes. On the Caribbean coast, Jack meets an American couple who has established the Sloth Rehabilitation Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey with some of the animal kingdom's most outstanding omnivores! Baboons, Black Bears, Chimpanzees, two-toed Sloths and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Rwanda for an incredible encounter with Golden Monkeys before getting a taste of the local fishing traditions, and they visit a primary school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon, Jack ventures down the Napo River in search of Pink River Dolphins. He meets a baby Tapir rescued from the jungle, and comes face-to-face with a deadly Caiman.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tall Tails
programme.desc: If you’ve ever wondered why animals have tails, join Jungle Jack for today’s tales about tails! Some tails are dangerous, some are powerful, and some are critical for high-speed navigation. Dolphins, ccorpions, crocs, lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack treks through the pristine Corcovado National Park in search of the elusive jaguar. On a night hike, Jack comes face-to-face with the tapir, a rainforest relative of the rhinoceros.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he crisscrosses the globe in search of animals who live in truly distinct habitats on the equator. Mountain gorillas, forest elephants, jaguars, orangutans, creatures from the Galapagos Islands, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In the south of Israel, the Hannas look at saving wildlife in the desert. Jack visits an ornithologist restoring a natural habitat in order to maintain an important fly-way for migratory birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Second Chances
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is meeting several lucky creatures that are getting a second chance at survival, with a little help from their friends. Gibbons, horses, sloths, and even a pigeon!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Baby Animals
programme.desc: The cuddly and rambunctious world of baby animals is always filled with fun and surprises. From orangutans and manatees to mountain gorillas, join in as Jack counts down ten moments of magic and mayhem with animal babies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a trio of stories from North Carolina, Jack takes a llama trek through the Great Smokey Mountains, learns about a unique veterinary program at the North Carolina Zoological Park, and checks out some of the state's endangered wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and the gang to Tasmania where they're checking out some of the most unique animals on the planet at Trowunna Wildlife Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Engineers
programme.desc: Today’s featured creatures are some of nature’s greatest engineers and architects. Constructing fortresses from leaves, designing homes with an eye for color, and building cozy bedrooms like you’ve never seen.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher is shocked when he finds his old college roommate is different than he remembers. At the same time, an embittered and retired pianist agrees to perform again in order to pay for a handicapped woman's surgery.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man falls in love with a beautiful woman who believes the couple was married in a past life 100 years earlier. The crew's amusement at Julie's new hairstyle creates pandemonium.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female doctor's temperature rises when she meets Isaac, who tries to avoid his physical exam so he can hide a congenital condition. Meanwhile, a young woman and her mother learn devastating truths about each other when they meet the daughter's fiance.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing and his crew host passengers and their pooches for the Honeycutt $10.000 Dog Show competition commencing in Acapulco.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: Rick desperately tries to escape the CRM, but his hope fades with every failed escape attempt; he is forced to find his way in this new world and risks losing himself in the process.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne finds unexpected help on her search for Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne must find a way to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne try to find the love they had.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Dangerous people make Rick and Michonne's journey difficult.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick and Michonne have to perform a near-impossible miracle.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Negan se introducen en la Mancomunidad para obligar a Hornsby a que deje de perseguir a sus familias. Pamela enfrenta las protestas de aquellos que están hartos de la impunidad de los crímenes de Sebastian.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Pamela hacen un trato de borrón y cuenta nueva en nombre de sus amigos. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se marchan hacia Oceanside para hablarles de un plan. La Commonwealth celebra el Día de los Fundadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene huye después del incidente del Día de los Fundadores. Pamela le pide a Mercer que investigue dónde está, para disgusto de Max y La Princesa. Por otro lado, Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se topan con un contratiempo peculiar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol investigan el paradero de sus amigos después de que Pamela los hiciera desaparecer de la Commonwealth. Por desgracia, su única pista es Hornsby. Por otro lado, Pamela le pide a Yumiko que procese a Eugene en nombre de la Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de separarse de sus hijos, Maggie, Gabriel y Rosita siguen un convoy militar hasta un destino misterioso. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan y Annie acaban en una zona de obras. Daryl y Carol siguen a un tren que lleva a Connie a bordo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los alejandrinos y los prisioneros vuelven a la Commonwealth para enfrentarse a Pamela Milton. Por otro lado, una horda se acerca a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol llevan a Judith al hospital, mientras que Rosita, Eugene y Gabriel buscan a Coco. Por otro lado, Maggie y Negan se enfrentan a Pamela y los héroes se reúnen para una última batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick trata de escapar de CRM, pero su esperanza se desvanece más y más con cada fracaso. No tiene otra opción que adaptarse a esta nueva realidad, aunque la esencia de su personalidad podría perderse en el proceso.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne ayuda a Aiden y Bailey a reencontrarse con su caravana. Agradecidos, ellos y su amigo Nat juran que la ayudarán a encontrar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Rick y Michonne buscan una forma de sobrevivir bajo el escrutinio de los militares de la República Cívica mientras fingen no conocerse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Michonne informa a Rick sobre su hijo, con la esperanza de que acepte volver a casa con ella. Sin embargo, Rick sigue negándose, ya que quiere terminar la misión de Okafor de reformar el CRM.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: El camino de Rick y Michonne no es tan sencillo como habían previsto; todo lo contrario, está lleno de peligros. Además, sospechan que alguien los persigue con la intención de acabar con ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Ones Who Live
programme.desc: Beale le revela a Rick la verdad sobre el colapso de Omaha y el inminente ataque contra Portland. El CRM pretende eliminar todas las comunidades independientes de supervivientes del mundo, y solo Rick y Michonne pueden impedírselo.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tempestuous diva becomes involved in a New Orleans puzzle when kidnappers attempt to abduct her during a singing performance.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An assignment to take possession of a priceless diamond for the National Museum takes James West to an eerie island estate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West aids a Russian prince in recovering an all-important icon, sought also by a desperate, dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent James T. West is exposed to a deadly plague when he tries to rescue a governor's daughter from a band of stagecoach robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The board of directors of a corporation owned by a spinsterish tycoon appears to be the target of an insidious plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Porch piers are fitted, and the homeowners explore kitchen cabinet options. Tommy vacuums the old insulation while Norm resizes a door for the kids' bath.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The mudroom foundation is laid. Tommy builds a custom bay window. Norm watches window restoration. Tommy puts in another beam to open up the front entryway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard creates an HVAC plan. An excavation crew replaces a water line and brick is laid for the porch. Tommy protects the mudroom against moisture and critters, while the homeowners pick a bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Katherine look at antiques for the Belmont Victorian. HVAC expert Brian Palen snakes ductwork through the house. Tommy frames the porch and shows Kevin how he built the stairs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and the homeowners look at samples of the Belmont Victorian exterior paint scheme. The tub is restored. An electrician wires the new master suite, and Tommy makes new molding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva lays the front at the Belmont Victorian. Katherine selects lighting fixtures while Tommy solves the ice dam issue. A gas fireplace and shingles are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy makes a mudroom-porch window. The homeowners select paint. Tommy clads the porch piers in shingles. Marble tile is laid in the master bath. Tommy builds floors in the kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy finishes the front porch. Kevin visits Vermont to see an artisan create a custom floorcloth for the kitchen. Tommy builds the porch railings. Kevin builds a treehouse for the kids.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm builds a ladder for the treehouse while Tommy lays decking, and Kevin fits balusters. The shingles are prepped for paint. Tommy fits a storm window, finishes the mudroom, and patches flooring.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replants the trees and shrubs. The backyard and treehouse are completed. Norm meets a craftsman who carves newel posts. Tommy and Kevin install kitchen cabinets. The marble countertop is fitted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tommy build a divider for storage. Richard reviews the mechanical systems. A special primer is used in the kitchen. Kevin learns about window treatments. Tommy goes through his punch list.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger finishes the landscape. Tommy makes disguised PVC floor registers. Richard installs the storm windows. The house is revealed, and everyone celebrates the renovated home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins a traditional farmhouse in Massachusetts, built in a factory 200 miles away.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin visit the Vermont factory where the house is built. Richard meets Ed Akerley, who blasts rock to make room for the foundation. Norm and Erik watch Scott McKenzy lay the foundation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An inspector checks the foundation as a perimeter drain is installed. The framing process begins. An architect explains her landscape plan to make the property look antique.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the plan for the living/dining room and the roof. After framing the house, the crew moves to the garage. Exterior trim arrives. Kevin learns how to attach the fascia board to the rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Erik lays shingles on the roof. Kevin learns colonial roof making. In Vermont, Kevin sees handcrafted light fixtures. Window installation begins. Norm heads to Maine to search for salvaged doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Drilling begins on a geothermal system. Norm visits first-period homes. Kevin tours a factory where the stairs and panels are built. On the North Shore, he learns of a new technology to seal ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps install clapboard siding. Roger selects salvaged granite. Richard discusses the insulation plan and sees how the geothermal pipes are connected. Kevin watches the cabinets come together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps fit the cabinets. Work starts on the driveway. Granite is used for a patio. The den gets wainscoting. The homeowners select interior paint colors. Erik installs the factory-made staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The staircase is finished. Richard shows the system for getting well water. A backup generator is installed. Kevin learns to fit a reproduction lantern. Kim turns a mud pit into a beautiful front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin builds a custom closet. Norm and Tommy see Kristina's designs. Richard shows Kevin the geothermal system. Kevin gets a tour of the second floor. The team celebrates another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Norm, Roger, Richard, and Tommy are back in Arlington—this time at an early English-style Arts and Crafts house built in 1909.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The design process kicks off. Old plaster walls are carefully demolished. Landscape plans and Roger begins removing the old Silver Maple. Kevin and Tommy bring down the exterior back wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a 100-year-old wooden beam with a new steel one. The tank gets removed by a specialist. The old concrete from the foundation gets transported to a recycling center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new concrete foundation is poured. Finding mature specimen trees for the yard. A precast concrete bulkhead is installed. The old rubble foundation gets waterproofed with synthetic rubber spray.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Steel beam fabrication and erection on the house. HVAC plans for the second floor. Front porch demoed with heavy machinery and new footings for a new porch. Working on the firebox and chimney.

programme.desc: Jimmy fixes up a 1977 Chevy pickup that has been idle on his farm for two years.

programme.desc: Jimmy and his brother Joe rehab a 1994 turbo backhoe.

programme.desc: Jimmy makes a leather bucket bag and recycled walnut-and-plywood-plank side tables.

programme.desc: Jimmy fabricates his first Go-Kart and engineers a truss bridge from wood-craft sticks.

programme.desc: Jimmy shares how he built his chicken coop and experiments with making ceramic tiles.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet loses her cool when the groovy guy and campus Adonis of her high school shows up for a date, and Jack and Chrissy conspire to leave them alone in the apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper's on a rampage for the rent so Jack's visiting uncle, a charming rascal, passes him a bad check.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A ruffled Helen Roper takes a cafeteria job to teach husband Stanley a lesson, but returns a wreck from the experience.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Janet, and Chrissy plot to escape a boring Christmas party alone with the Ropers because the three roommates are invited to a big bash the same night.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack becomes caught in a dilemma when Chrissy believes he has bought her an expensive birthday present and the gift turns out to be a surprise for Roper's wife.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack becomes entangled in a feud between his two roommates when Janet accuses Chrissy of stealing a handsome young executive from her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A tiny tyke terrorizes Jack and Chrissy with the threat of tears after Janet presses them into service as inexperienced, substitute sitters.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy cranks out amateur movies of Jack and Janet, and is misled into thinking she has an "interesting" talent for film making.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: All work no play makes Jack an angry boy when Janet hires him to work for her and acts like a tough boss.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack, Chrissy, and Janet set out for a gourmet dinner for the Ropers - designed to stave off an expected rent hike - the " meanest" sailor from Jack's navy days arrives and wrecks the evening.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is in a panic - and in the doghouse with Chrissy and Janet - when a young pregnant woman arrives at the house and names him as the father.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Chrissy, and Janet find out how far Mr. Roper's garden has gone to pot when they find some unusual plants while weeding it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Chrissy's father, the minister, throws the kids into a panic. Jack decides to move out temporarily but Reverend Snow arrives before Jack can leave. Fumbling for an explanation, Janet blurts out that she and Jack are married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy offer to baby-sit for Stanley Roper's parakeet in exchange for a couple of concert tickets.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise birthday party for Jack is nearly spoiled when an old girlfriend turns up, ready to entice Jack back into her web. Guest Star(s): Loni Anderson

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack lies to his girlfriend in order to keep a date with his new romantic interest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The women in Jack's life go to a nude beach protest and run into trouble with the cops.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Curious landlord Stanley Roper sneaks a peek at an X-rated diary Chrissy is typing and suddenly gets the idea that Chrissy is in love with him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets caught in an exasperating willpower contest with Chrissy to determine whether he can give up women for longer than she can give up food.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls and secret meetings lead Jack, Janet, and Chrissy to believe that Helen Roper is having an illicit fling with her husband's best friend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Overprotective Janet goes into a rage when she finds Jack in the same bed with her attractive sister - who is visiting.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet face the danger of losing Chrissy to a fast-talking guru who dazzles her into believing her place is at his side - in a distant commune.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack finds himself in hot water when best friends Larry's girl says she still has a mad crush on him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet are up in arms when Chrissy announces that she is leaving on an overnight business trip with her new boss.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet and Chrissy angrily blame Jack for sending them on a wild goose chase to a nonexistent party, never dreaming that it is the Roper's teenage house guest who wants them out of the way so she can have all to herself.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet are shocked as evidence mounts that Chrissy seems compelled to steal, not only from them but also from the Ropers.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Landlord Stanley Roper plays such a dirty trick on Jack, Janet, and Chrissy that his wife walks out on him.

programme.title: Gekisou Sentai Carranger

programme.title: Gekisou Sentai Carranger

programme.desc: With RV Robo abducted by RitchiRitchihiker and no other means to fight back, the Carranger are approached by the mysterious VRV Master, who offers them new vehicle mecha to fight Braking. But can he be trusted?

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Richard Commey

programme.title: Jeff Harding vs Dennis Andries

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena

programme.desc: Savannah and Stevie Jr. try to manage Dorian's career. Stevie gets a culture shock when he tries to woo a French beauty. At K. Michelle's suggestion, Stevie meets with a PR exec for tips on how to launch his party venture Sleazy J's!

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie and Scrappy enter the exciting world of semi-pro Wrestling! Will the duo be able to hold their own against the reigning Tag Team Champs? Meanwhile, two women test Stevie and Safaree with a yoga challenge.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie can't seem to explain his vision for Sleazy J's, so he decides to get his message across with a unique invitation to his first ever pop-up party. Stevie takes it upon himself to find Mr. Right for his daughter, Savannah.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie throws the inaugural Sleazy J party, a star-studded event, and invites a special someone to be his date. Meanwhile, he is forced to put his chef's hat on to make a unicorn cake for Eva's fundraiser.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After the release of his most recent album, T.I. decides to pack up and take the family on a winter adventure. But new to the ski slopes anything could happen with this family as they try to tackle the mountains of Big Bear, CA. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Major is becoming a little man and it's time for him to get his own bed. King struggles with understanding the difference between the reality of his own life and the allure of his dad's. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah tells Tameka raising kids isn't hard, Tameka challenges her to take care of the Harris children for a day. Meanwhile, Tip and Tameka use the opportunity to step out and have fun. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Spring Break around the corner, Tameka convinces Tip to take the family to the West Coast for a beach vacation. Meanwhile, a controversial love letter is found in King's backpack causing the entire family to weigh in. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah is trying to move up in the hair industry and hopes a booth at the world famous Bronner Bros. hair show will help take her there. With Tip and Tameka out of town, will Shekinah be able to keep it classy? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip sees Major spending more time with his video games than his friends, Tip decides to set up a play date. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Major asks Tip to be in his new music video for his single "Hello" with CeeLo Green, Tip decides to incorporate the entire family. Will the kids be up to the challenge?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Messiah turning thirteen and entering into young adulthood, Tip encourages Messiah to go on his very first date. But in typical Harris family fashion, going solo is a no-no, so the whole family comes along for the ride. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Ja Rule gets Punk'd when Brittney brings home a pretend boyfriend to prove she's not a kid anymore. Jeff and Jordy put their lives on the line when Grandma Debra attempts to teach Grandma Jean how to drive.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: When Ja has a concert in NYC, Jeff turns Brittney's low key night with friends into a raging house party. The grannies use Ja's performance as an excuse to go man hunting.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Jordy goes on his first date with help from Ja and Brittney. After being grounded for slacking off at school, Jeff sneaks out of the house to go to a strip club.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi questions whether to return to LA. Jackie's husband Doug Christie is being offered a new job. Angel Brinks and Malaysia have drama over their dress-related beef. Tami Roman is in town with the hopes of having a baby. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi throws a Welcome to L.A. party for her "sister" Duffey but Malaysia's attitude is anything but welcoming. Brandi's ex Jason returns hoping to rekindle their relationship. Jackie surprises Doug with a downtown condo. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi must defend Malaysia's behavior to "sister" Duffey. Malaysia and Angel Brinks attempt to put their feud to rest. Angel Brinks holds a launch party for her clothing line, but drama threatens to derail the event. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi goes off on Angel Love for voicing her opinion. When Malaysia defends her bestie Brandi, Duffey's opinion about Malaysia changes for the better. Jackie convinces Shaunie and Brandi to hash out their problems. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia proposes a ladies "peace trip" to Big Bear Lake CA. Angel Brinks's relationship with her baby daddy is called into question. Angel Love comes at Malaysia for rolling up on her at Brinks's party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: At Big Bear Lake Angel Love goes head-to-head with Malaysia, Brandi and Duffey. Duffey offers to direct a music video for Tami's daughter Jazz. Jackie tries to broker peace between Duffey and Love but makes matters worse. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Angel Brinks plans her clothing line anniversary party but it turns into a circus. Tami and Duffey collaborate on Jazz's music video but their visions don't match. Doug breaks the news to Jackie that he is taking a coaching position. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Angel Brinks hosts a star-studded event for the anniversary of her clothing company but Jackie's erratic behavior makes it a night to remember. Tami and Reggie visit a fertility doctor, and Jackie seeks the advice of an energy healer. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's display at Angel Brinks's party causes a rift. Brandi and Duffey plan a BBQ to get to the bottom of Jackie's behavior. Tami confronts Duffey about her daughter's music video and makes a drastic decision. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami fires Duffey from her daughter's music video. Angel Brinks and Angel Love have it out with Jackie after her breakdown at Angel Brinks's party. Tami hustles to finish her daughter's music video in time for the release party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami gets some scandalous information from a friend. Jackie tries to lose weight in order to keep Doug interested. At Tami's daughter's video release party, Angel Brinks gets blindsided and Jackie finds herself in the line of fire. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie asks Malaysia to be by her side during a very personal weight loss procedure. Duffey apologizes to Tami's daughter in an attempt to make things right with Tami. Doug takes Jackie on a romantic date and reveals a huge surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: As the ladies all prepare for their trip to Portugal, Malaysia attempts to broker a peace between Tami and Duffey. Soon after her arrival, Duffey has second thoughts about her decision to come on the trip. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies explore Portugal and try to relax, but the tension between Duffey and Tami has everyone on edge. Jackie fears the worst when she can't get ahold of Doug. Tami finally confronts Duffey in an explosive showdown. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?
